Market Overview

A market overview provides a comprehensive summary of the current state and trends within a specific market or industry. It typically includes key metrics such as market size, growth rate, major players, trends, challenges, and opportunities.

Learn More

Cryptocurrency Market

The cryptocurrency market refers to the global ecosystem where various cryptocurrencies are traded. It encompasses exchanges, trading platforms, investors, miners, developers, and other participants involved in buying,
selling, and exchanging digital currencies. This market operates 24/7 and is decentralized, meaning there is no central authority governing it.

Learn More

Maximize your trading performance on JMPcapitals

Zero Fee Zone

Deep liquidity and order book depth

Powerful tools and analytics

High quality customer care

Powerful tools for traders

Trade ahead

Advanced trading tools built to help you get ahead.

Trade with flexibility

Leverage your existing assets at ease with cross-collateralization.

Trade efficiently

Manage and trade all of your spot and futures positions in one place.

Industry-leading security

Advanced Access control

We provide an additional layer of security when signing in, ensuring that only you have access to your account.

Active Bug Bounty Program

We encourage everyone to help us identify vulnerabilities in our web applications and API.

Certification to ISO/IEC 27001

Our platform meets the standards for information security (ISO/IEC 27001) as certified by BSI.

About Us

JMPcapitals is the combined effort of quantitative traders, engineers, technologists, and entrepreneurs originating from top traditional and crypto financial institutions with a wealth of experience and depth of expertise in developing innovative financial and trading solutions.

Our expertise and experience originates from the top financial and education institutions

About Us

JMP capitals Corp is a subsidiary of JMP Capital Management Pte. Ltd., authorized and regulated by the Legal entity identifier, registration number 202108692G.
JMP Capital .Trading is a company registered in Singapore by Lei, MAS, and in Dubai Multi Commodities Center (DMCC) Free Zone with registration number RA000523

JMPcapitals is authorised and regulated by the Canadian Financial Industry Regulatory Authority, registration number 574892

License number : 549300IXKVTWDO7JMV05

jmpcapitals.io is responsible for card payments processing.
